title: Turkish Flatbread Pizza with Spicy Nduja
description: A twist on traditional pizza, using turkish flatbread and spicy nduja. Perfect for a quick and delicious snack.
instructions: Place the turkish flatbread on a baking sheet.
Spread the nduja evenly over the flatbread.
Sprinkle the flaky sea salt over the nduja.
Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Slice into wedges and serve immediately.
